  1. org.jscience.core.mathematics.geometry.boundaries

Uses of Package
org.jscience.core.mathematics.geometry.boundaries

Packages that use org.jscience.core.mathematics.geometry.boundaries
Package
Description
org.jscience.core.mathematics.geometry
 
org.jscience.core.mathematics.geometry.boundaries
Comprehensive boundary and region support for geometric modeling.
org.jscience.natural.earth
 
org.jscience.social.architecture.traffic
Provides models and simulation engines for urban traffic flow analysis.
org.jscience.social.geography
Provides classes for social geography, human settlements, and mapping.
org.jscience.social.history.archeology
Provides classes and interfaces for archaeological research and analysis.
  • Classes in org.jscience.core.mathematics.geometry.boundaries used by org.jscience.core.mathematics.geometry
    Class
    Description
    ConvexPolygon2D
    A convex polygon in 2D space.
    ConvexPolyhedron3D
    A convex polyhedron in 3D space.
  • Classes in org.jscience.core.mathematics.geometry.boundaries used by org.jscience.core.mathematics.geometry.boundaries
    Class
    Description
    Boundary
    Base interface for all geometric boundaries.
    Boundary2D
    Interface for two-dimensional boundaries (regions in a plane).
    Boundary3D
    Interface for three-dimensional boundaries (volumes).
    Boundary3D.Face
    Represents a face of the 3D boundary.
    BoundingBox
    Axis-aligned bounding box for any boundary.
    BoundingBox2D
    Axis-aligned bounding box in 2D.
    BoundingBox3D
    Axis-aligned bounding box in 3D.
    CompositeBoundary2D
    A composite 2D boundary supporting exclaves and enclaves.
    CompositeBoundary2D.ContainmentResult
    Result of a containment check with detailed status.
    CompositeBoundary2D.ContainmentResult.Status
     
    CompositeBoundary3D.ContainmentResult
    Containment result with detailed status.
    CompositeBoundary3D.ContainmentResult.Status
     
    ConvexPolygon2D
    A convex polygon in 2D space.
    ConvexPolyhedron3D
    A convex polyhedron in 3D space.
    ConvexPolyhedron3D.TriangularFace
    Represents a triangular face.
    FuzzyBoundary2D
    A 2D boundary with fuzzy (graded) membership.
    PointBoundary
    A zero-dimensional boundary representing a single point.

    Description

    Base interface for all geometric boundaries.

    Boundary
    Base interface for all geometric boundaries.
    CompositeBoundary
    A composite boundary supporting inclusions (exclaves) and exclusions (enclaves).
